allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; ['bcrypt','bcryptjs','jsonwebtoken','zod','mongoose','next','@types/bcrypt','@types/bcryptjs','@types/jsonwebtoken'].forEach\(k => console.log\(k+':', deps[k] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(\(d.get\('exports'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
